body: #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]$0

opt.unwrap_or.description: Extract Option value or compute a fallback.

opt.let_else.description: let-else on an Option, borrowing the inner value. Early returns if None.

if.opt.none.description: Branch when an Option is None.

if.opt.let.description: if let Some, moving out of the Option.

if.opt.some.description: Branch when an Option is Some, binding a reference to the inner value.

if.res.err.description: Branch when a Result is Err.

trait.async.description: Async trait definition using the async_trait crate.
